subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy handmaiden who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and hath hastened unto the fields [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذه امتک التی آمنت بک و بایاتک و سرعت الی میادین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
